issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path.

scenarios.name: cycles-gpu-product-shot
scenarios.rationale: Treatment sets the OpenImageDenoise denoiser, calls `prefs.get_devices()` after setting `compute_device_type`, enables `film_transparent` with RGBA, and uses a `TRACK_TO` constraint aimed at the Product object; baseline configures Cycles GPU at a high level but typically omits the explicit denoiser name and the get_devices step.

scenarios.name: turntable-animation-png-sequence
scenarios.rationale: Treatment renders a numbered PNG sequence (not direct video) using `frame_start`/`frame_end` and `bpy.ops.render.render(animation=True)` plus the `blender --background --frame-start --frame-end --render-anim` CLI invocation; baseline tends to render straight to MP4, risking lost frames on crash.
